Question:
Search for scientific literature (specifically papers related to Hawking radiation, quantum gravity, and black hole thermodynamics) to identify the three universal dimensionless constants that govern the classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation. These are referred to as 'Black Hole Classicality Constants'. Retrieve the exact numerical values for all three constants.
